title: DEEPSYNTH Leaderboard Submission
description: Schema for a submission to the DEEPSYNTH leaderboard. A submission is a JSON ARRAY of objects, one per task, each containing the original 'Question Number' and the agent's 'answer'. This format is consumed directly by scripts/evaluation/eval_static_score.py.

Question Number.description: Task ID matching the DEEPSYNTH question file. Dev split: 1-40. Test split: 1-80. May be an integer or a zero-padded string.

answer.description: The agent's final output for this task. Preferred: a JSON object / array / number matching the task's expected answer schema (see intermediate_answers_schemas/ in the HF dataset). Also accepted: a raw string — if so, the evaluator extracts JSON after an optional '<Answer>:' marker. Do NOT include chain-of-thought, reasoning traces, or tool transcripts here.

cost_usd.description: Optional: estimated USD cost for this task.

latency_s.description: Optional: wall-clock seconds for this task.

num_tool_calls.description: Optional: total tool invocations for this task.

num_tokens_input.description: Optional: total input tokens for this task.

num_tokens_output.description: Optional: total output tokens for this task.

trace_url.description: Optional: link to a full trace (LangSmith, W&B, etc.).
